## Summary
- What changed and why

## Scope
- [ ] Content only
- [ ] UI/CSS
- [ ] JS behavior
- [ ] Data/scripts
- [ ] Workflows/docs

## Verification
- [ ] Local preview checked (`python3 -m http.server 8000`)
- [ ] Navigation links tested
- [ ] No obvious console errors on edited pages
- [ ] Generated pages regenerated if template changed

## Notes/Risks
- Any manual follow-up or known limitations
